name: Plague Knight
description: A venomous warrior who poisons foes and endures through attrition. High attack and intelligence; fragile but lethal over time.

abilities.name: Septic Strike
abilities.description: A venomous blade strike that deals damage and inflicts bleed.

abilities.name: Poison Cloud
abilities.description: Release a billowing cloud of toxic vapor that ignores enemy defense.

abilities.name: Toxic Aura
abilities.description: Emanate a poisonous field that boosts your resistance to damage. (Defense buff not yet wired.)
